question: Q5
title: Dashboard: bare-dash is a real data gap, count/title are model-rendering (PARTIAL)
summary: Only the bare-dash is a code fix: graph/degree rows carry rrfScore/score but the public row shape exposes only similarity (absent for those channels), so the model renders a dash. Surface the resolved score on every row. Count-vs-rows and the (truncated) literal are model-side rendering of imperfect data (not in the code), fixable by tightening the presentation contract. Iteration was partial: executor over-explored and compacted.
